outfit_info.outfit_description: This athletic ensemble features a vibrant orange distressed T-shirt layered under a functional dark grey utility vest. Perforated olive shorts are worn over light grey performance tights, creating a dynamic bottom half. The look is completed with bold, multi-colored sneakers, signaling readiness for active outdoor pursuits with a blend of comfort and technical design.

model_attributes.body: The model possesses a lean, athletic physique, presenting the performance-oriented garments effectively and naturally.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright with a relaxed, slightly angled stance, the model clearly displays the complete athletic outfit from head to toe.
model_attributes.background: A minimalist, solid light grey studio background is utilized, ensuring the entire focus remains exclusively on the styled outfit.
